chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 197 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 13.11.2023 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bhatt, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, learned Counsel for the applicant does not press this application and seeks direction to the trial Court to examine material witnesses within a period of one month. This proposition has not been opposed by learned Additional Prosecutor General. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed. However, learned trial Court is directed to examine material witnesses including injured within a period of one month by ensuring their attendance in the Court through all modes of service. After such development, applicant would be at liberty to file a fresh application before the trial Court, which shall decide the same on its own merits and on the basis of record, independent of this order. J U D G E Abdul Basit
